svg.text: one rung deeper per failed fix

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace

text.tspan: when powers of the same base are multiplied,

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace

svg.text: RUNG 2 · THE CONSTRAINT, THEN WHAT IT REQUIRES

text.tspan: “A factor that can be negative flips the inequality
one minus x positive and one minus x negative.”

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace

svg.text: RUNG 3 · THE SOLUTIONS, ONE STEP ONLY

text.tspan: “This one step is worked in the printed solutions — explaining to yourself
and rewriting it in your own words is what makes it hold.”

text.font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace

svg.text: the violated constraint is named at every rung · the corrected value at none · statements, never orders
